name: Complexity trim matrix
description: Decision matrix for identifying which menu or service elements create disproportionate execution drag relative to value and should be simplified first.
source_ref: core-v2: complexity should be trimmed with explicit tradeoff logic, not instinct alone
usage_moment: Use when the current offer is creating repeated instability and leadership is reviewing simplification options.
expected_output: A ranked view of high-complexity, low-defensibility offer elements with proposed simplification actions.
